description_long: A rectangular wooden sushi board features eight neatly arranged maki rolls, each with a white rice exterior, a pinkish-orange topping suggestive of salmon, and a green center likely representing cucumber or avocado. Two brown chopsticks rest diagonally across the board, adding an authentic touch. A small, round, gray bowl, possibly for soy sauce, is placed on one side of the board. The board itself has a geometric, textured pattern in black and brown, giving it a modern, stylish appearance. The sushi pieces are uniform in size and shape, and the overall presentation is clean and inviting. No visible garnishes or toppings are present on the sushi rolls.
description: A wooden sushi board holds eight maki rolls with pink tops and green centers, accompanied by chopsticks and a small gray bowl. The board features a bold geometric pattern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sushi rolls in two rows, chopsticks resting diagonally, and the bowl positioned at the back right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the geometric board pattern, the bowl on the right, and the chopsticks lying across the sushi.
description_view_2: Rear view with the bowl now on the left, sushi rolls in two rows, and chopsticks partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the green centers of the maki rolls, chopsticks crossing the board, and the bowl on the left.
